nodes.name: Zoe's imperial pigeon
nodes.summary: Zoe's imperial pigeon（Ducula zoeae）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Zoe's imperial pigeon。

nodes.name: Zoe's imperial pigeon
nodes.summary: Zoe's imperial pigeon or Zoe imperial pigeon (Ducula zoeae), also known as the banded imperial pigeon, is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is found in New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, subtropical or tropical mangrove forest, and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. It is named after Zoë Lesson (fl. 1810), the wife of French ornithologist René-Primevère Lesson, who described it. References

nodes.name: 皇鸠属
nodes.summary: 皇鸠属（Ducula）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联42种鸟类，如Pink-bellied imperial pigeon、Mindoro imperial pigeon、Grey-headed imperial pigeon等42种鸟类。
